summary: A Go-based testing and validation runner with Goss migration support, OpenTelemetry tracing, and a plugin system.
concerns: Heavy documentation churn relative to feature commits
Potential over-reliance on Goss migration rather than native schema
Clean git status with recent CCS standardization may mask incomplete refactoring
suggestions: Focus on expanding native assertion types beyond GraphQL introspection
Evaluate plugin adoption and community usage
Consolidate documentation to reduce maintenance overhead
Add integration tests for the OpenTelemetry multi-backend reporter
